field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: In this specific elution mode (EATP–LC), the fractionation is only governed by the nature and the number of functions attached to the polymer backbone, independent of the molar mass distribution of the whole sample.
field_evidence.critical_component: polystyrene chains are eluted at the same retention time, whatever their molar mass

conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution at the exclusion–adsorption transition point (EATP) where retention is independent of molar mass
conditions.physical_address: Laboratoire de Chimie des Polymeres Organiques, UMR 5629, ENSCPB – Universite Bordeaux, 1 Avenue Pey Berland, BP 108, F-33402 Talence Cedex, France
conditions.notes: Used for fractionation of functional PS (alcohol, acetal, aldehyde, acidic) from non-functional PS.
